items.title: Rant on people complaining about packs and pulls
items.summary:
Plenty of pulls (unless you like to get needless copies). I have zero clue why someone said 500 bucks for an event?? Where?? And if they were talking about all the packs the game has to offer, yeah I actually agree it’s not worth it. But you know why? Because their bad value is so clearly meant for the whales AND there is no PVP so there’s been no FOMO for me. Coming from someone who has quit countless games from FOMO. 

And you’re supposed to use your brain (and patience) to pull for good characters with the plentiful pulls you have, gradually build characters, and THEN clear ENDGAME content. You aren’t supposed to grab the one specific character you want. You pull on the current limited banners (which have characters CAPABLE of clearing lots of content). Before then, there is plenty to do. I’m 3 weeks in and still progressing my way WITHOUT roadblocks through chapter seven out of however many on ARC ONE. And I’ve still yet to get into d-tide or that train thing or whatever.

And they did mention 60 bucks for 250 pulls but forgot to mention that the same event gives you 250 FREE pulls…also it’s not 60 bucks it’s like 40. 250 being handed out is already diabolical like what are you talking about, u want a thousand when a character is guaranteed at 90 pulls, but pity is at 30?

Not a single character is useless. Like if a character is listed as B tier, they’re GREAT in certain comps. C tier too depending on the guide you’re using. Even standard characters are good. Caecus and Sanga are cracked.

And finally, great art. 

My only complaint would be that most characters aren’t animated, but I found out the game was close to EOS not long ago so it makes sense.

I feel bad for the ppl who can’t login though. Had to connect my account on several devices and though it was confusing, I eventually brute forced my way through with my apple account.
items.author: Severelag

items.title: One of the best gacha games
items.summary: Amazing gameplay, dev team, combat system, story, music and everything else. This is one of the most unique and bold gacha games i have ever seen and its amazing. Must play
items.author: Huzi_loupe

items.title: Hands down the greatest Gacha game I’ve played, never been so addicted.
items.summary: They had some problems at the start, but they are on their feet and very generous, incredible gameplay and character design is amazing. I only wish they would balance the gender ratio like they said they would. This needs more popularity.
items.author: FernSylvan

items.title: Good game
items.summary: In love with the gameplay, this game also has a very lovely artstyle and story. Can’t wait for full English translation!

items.title: very much recommend!!
items.summary: a bit of a long review, but i saw this game & was a little hesitant to download, but I’m so glad i did. the characters are very well designed & even the mc’s (female & male) are pretty. the combat is like a card game (similar to r1999) with turn-based combat, and the backgrounds are gorgeous. the english translation is apparently in beta, but i haven’t noticed any translation mistakes so far. the story is very compelling thus far and highlighted by the detailed art & characters. the combat itself is very nice to look at, and isn’t mechanically clunky or too difficult. it also includes some art within it, which is very pretty. the voice lines are not in english (I’m not sure if they’ll be in english at some point) but they’re so well preformed enough that the language barrier isn’t an issue, you can tell exactly what the characters are saying via the text & their tones. the gacha, as far as I’ve seen, is fairly good. it has a limited & standard banners just like any other gacha game, and currency doesn’t seem too hard to get. this game is so good that i was passionate enough to write this review. just play it.
items.author: naerystea

items.title: Beautiful game
items.summary: One of the most beautiful and catching mobile games. I love the atmosphere, character design, world-building and creepy story. Even though it is a gatcha, it is very generous with its ingame currency and pull rates.
items.author: Starshade78

items.title: Incroyable 🥰
items.summary: Jeu très intéressant avec une histoire prometteuse. Les personnages sont attachants et la D.A un peu horrifique rajoute une belle ambiance ! Le jeu est plutôt généreux et le gameplay très original (j’ai jamais joué à un jeu gacha comme celui-ci) Le seul petit bémol est la traduction un peu bancale, mais au moins il y en a une 😅 Bref, j’adore ce jeu et je compte y jouer pendant un long moment encore 💕

items.title: Fun but flawed
items.summary: The game itself is very fun, but there are a few infuriating issues- I crash at the end of non-combat story stages, plus the game always launches upside down, needing me to manually rotate my phone to get it back to my desired screen orientation
